title: Carry Up
description: This is a port of "Carry On" to a datapack.
body:
# Carry Up
This is a port of "[Carry On](https://modrinth.com/mod/carry-on)" to a datapack.

### What this datapack adds
- *Carry Up Wand (Storage blocks)* (Item)
  - When right-clicked facing a **storage block** (chest/barrel/ender chest) will drop its contents in item form


### What I plan to add
- *Passive Capsule* (Item)
  - A *Passive Capsule* can hold any passive mob. Used for upgrading your wand.

- *Infusion Altar* (Block)
  - Takes these six items to upgrade to a *Carry Up Wand (Storage blocks/Passive mobs)*
    - *Diamond*
    - *Carry Up Wand (Storage blocks)*
    - 4 of any passive mob drop

- *Carry Up Wand (Storage blocks/Passive mobs)* (Item)
  - When right-clicked facing a **storage block** (chest/barrel/ender chest) will drop its contents in item form
  - When right-clicked facing a **passive mob** will capture the mob into a *Passive Capsule* if the player is holding a *Passive Capsule* in their offhand.

- *Carry Up Wand (Storage blocks/Passive mobs/Hostile mobs)* (Item)
  - When right-clicked facing a **storage block** (chest/barrel/ender chest) will drop its contents in item form
  - When right-clicked facing a **passive mob** will capture the mob into a *Passive Capsule* if the player is holding a *Passive Capsule* in their offhand.
  - When right-clicked facing a **hostile mob** will capture the mob into a *Hostile Capsule* if the player is holding a *Hostile Capsule* in their offhand.

- Slow the player if they have picked up a storage block/passive mob/hostile mob.
